productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Tape Black Casual Shoe
description: Stylish and uber cool, these suede semi-formal desert boots from red tape will add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality suede upper and comfortable lace up system, these shoes are the best bet for an instant smart look, especially when you team them with jeans or chinos. Upper Suede upper for added durability and style Rounded toe design for a more stylish look Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Two-eyelet lace-up panel for a more stylish look and better ventilation to the feet Contrast thread detailing for added structure and style Softly padded tongue to protect from excessive  rubbing and prevent blisters Suede wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Brand tab on lateral midfoot Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Cushioned footbed for extra comfort Leather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured pattern through out the outsole for improved grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe careUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
